name: Chocolate Mud Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 or 2-cup glass measure, heat together chocolate chips and milk in microwave oven on high for 45-50 seconds, or until the chocolate is melted and smooth when stirred.
2. Add vanilla and corn syrup, then blend well.
3. Refrigerate, stirring occasionally, until thickened to frosting consistency.
